hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.repo-orchestrator/registry.json';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){process.stdout.write('⚠️  repo-orchestrator: No registry found.
   Run /repo-orch-setup for guided installation (checks prerequisites + bootstraps workspace).
   Or run /repo-orch-init to skip the wizard and bootstrap directly.
');}"
